name: UBA : Inbox Set to Forward to External Inbox
notes: Detects if a mailbox is set to forward to a domain that is not listed in the Trust Domains reference set.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250683) Set Mailbox Succeeded
when the event matches FwdDomain (custom) is not N/A
when any of FwdDomain (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Trusted Domains - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Inbox Set to Forward to External Inbox on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250683) Set Mailbox Succeeded
AND when the event matches FwdDomain (custom) is not N/A
AND NOT when any of FwdDomain (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Trusted Domains - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Inbox Set to Forward to External Inbox
